name: Pera Wallet
shortDescription: The official mobile and web wallet for Algorand.
longDescription: Pera is the most widely-used non-custodial wallet in the Algorand ecosystem, available on iOS, Android, and as a Web Wallet. It supports ASAs, NFTs, dApp connections via WalletConnect, on-ramp purchases, and staking participation. Pera has become the default wallet experience for Algorand newcomers and active DeFi users alike.
aiSummary: Default non-custodial wallet on Algorand. Mobile + web, ASA + NFT support, WalletConnect.

name: Defly Wallet
shortDescription: Power-user Algorand wallet with built-in DeFi tools.
longDescription: Defly is a mobile-first Algorand wallet aimed at DeFi power-users. It integrates a swap aggregator, portfolio analytics, NFT viewer, governance participation, and access to staking pools — all within the wallet itself. Defly is a favorite among active Algorand users who want a single app for wallet + DeFi management.
aiSummary: Mobile wallet with built-in DEX aggregator and DeFi tooling for active Algorand users.

name: Lute Wallet
shortDescription: A modern browser-extension wallet for Algorand.
longDescription: Lute is a browser extension wallet built for Algorand power users and developers. It supports dApp connections, watch-only accounts, multisig, and rekeying. Lute fills the role on Algorand that browser wallets like MetaMask play on EVM chains.
aiSummary: Browser-extension wallet for Algorand dApp interactions and developer workflows.

name: Kibisis
shortDescription: Open-source browser wallet for Algorand and AVM chains.
longDescription: Kibisis is an open-source web browser extension wallet for Algorand and AVM-compatible chains. It supports multi-account management, ARC-0027 standard for dApp connections, and is positioned as a developer-friendly alternative for Algorand interaction in the browser.
aiSummary: Open-source browser wallet for Algorand with ARC-0027 dApp connection standard support.

name: Tinyman
shortDescription: The original automated market maker on Algorand.
longDescription: Tinyman launched as the first AMM-style decentralized exchange on Algorand, pioneering the on-chain liquidity model in the ecosystem. It now operates V2 with concentrated liquidity, multi-pool routing, and farming. Tinyman is one of the highest-TVL DEXs in the ecosystem and a routing hop for most aggregators.
aiSummary: First AMM on Algorand. High-TVL DEX with concentrated liquidity and farming pools.

name: Pact
shortDescription: Algorand DEX with stable swap and standard AMM pools.
longDescription: Pact is a decentralized exchange on Algorand offering both constant-product (standard) and stable-swap pools, similar to Curve on Ethereum. It powers efficient stablecoin and pegged-asset swaps, making it a key liquidity venue for assets like USDC/USDT and goBTC/algoUSD pairs.
aiSummary: Algorand DEX with both standard and stableswap pools — go-to venue for pegged-asset swaps.

name: Humble DeFi
shortDescription: Cross-AMM DEX and farm built on Algorand.
longDescription: Humble DeFi is a decentralized exchange and yield protocol on Algorand. It offers AMM pools, liquidity farming with HMBL token incentives, and integrates with Reach for the underlying smart contracts. Humble has become a popular choice for community-driven farming in the Algorand ecosystem.
aiSummary: Community-driven DEX + farm on Algorand built with Reach smart contracts.

name: Vestige
shortDescription: DEX aggregator and on-chain analytics for Algorand.
longDescription: Vestige is the leading DEX aggregator and analytics platform for Algorand. It routes swaps across Tinyman, Pact, Humble, and other liquidity venues to find optimal prices. Vestige also exposes detailed token charts, holder distributions, and ASA-level analytics for the broader Algorand ecosystem.
aiSummary: Algorand DEX aggregator with ASA analytics. Routes across Tinyman, Pact, Humble for best prices.

name: Folks Finance
shortDescription: Lending, borrowing, and liquid staking on Algorand.
longDescription: Folks Finance is the largest lending and borrowing protocol on Algorand. Users can supply ALGO, USDC, goBTC, and other assets to earn yield or borrow against collateral. Folks also offers liquid staking via the gALGO token, letting users participate in governance rewards while keeping liquidity.
aiSummary: Largest lending protocol on Algorand. Supply/borrow major assets, liquid staking via gALGO.

name: CompX
shortDescription: DeFi platform offering compounded yield strategies on Algorand.
longDescription: CompX builds compounded DeFi strategies on Algorand. Users can stake into managed vaults that auto-compound farming rewards from underlying DEXs and lending markets. The COMPX token powers governance and reward distribution.
aiSummary: Auto-compounding yield vaults built on top of Algorand DEXs and lending markets.

name: Cometa
shortDescription: Liquidity farming and DeFi infrastructure on Algorand.
longDescription: Cometa offers liquidity farming pools across major Algorand DEX pairs. It provides a single UI to stake LP tokens from Tinyman, Pact, and other venues to earn boosted yields, with auto-compounding strategies for set-and-forget farming.
aiSummary: Single-UI farming aggregator for Algorand DEX LP tokens with auto-compound strategies.

name: xBacked
shortDescription: Decentralized stablecoin platform on Algorand.
longDescription: xBacked is a decentralized stablecoin protocol on Algorand, similar in design to MakerDAO. Users lock collateral (ALGO, goBTC, etc.) to mint the xUSD stablecoin. The protocol uses over-collateralization and liquidation auctions to maintain the peg.
aiSummary: Maker-style decentralized stablecoin on Algorand. Mint xUSD against ALGO and other collateral.

name: Algomint
shortDescription: Bridge wrapping BTC and ETH into Algorand-native assets.
longDescription: Algomint mints wrapped versions of major external assets (goBTC, goETH) on Algorand. It uses a federated custodian model to mint 1:1 collateral-backed tokens, enabling Bitcoin and Ethereum exposure for Algorand DeFi protocols.
aiSummary: Bridge for wrapped BTC and ETH into Algorand-native goBTC/goETH ASAs.

name: Goracle
shortDescription: Decentralized oracle network for Algorand.
longDescription: Goracle is the primary decentralized oracle network for Algorand, delivering price feeds, randomness, and off-chain data to smart contracts. It uses a network of independent nodes with cryptographic proofs to ensure data integrity, and is integrated by major DeFi protocols on the chain.
aiSummary: Decentralized oracle network on Algorand. Price feeds, VRF, off-chain data for smart contracts.

name: Lofty
shortDescription: Tokenized real estate marketplace on Algorand.
longDescription: Lofty lets investors buy fractional shares of US single-family rental properties as Algorand tokens. Each property is held in a US LLC and tokenized as an ASA. Rental income is distributed daily in USDC directly to token holders. Lofty is one of the largest real-world asset (RWA) deployments on Algorand by token count.
aiSummary: Tokenized US single-family rentals on Algorand with daily USDC distributions.

name: Rand Gallery
shortDescription: The largest NFT marketplace on Algorand.
longDescription: Rand Gallery is the leading NFT marketplace on Algorand, offering primary minting, secondary trading, collection pages, royalties, and creator tools. It hosts the majority of Algorand NFT collections and serves as the primary discovery surface for new drops.
aiSummary: Leading NFT marketplace on Algorand. Primary mints, secondary trading, creator royalties.

name: Asalytic
shortDescription: Analytics platform for Algorand NFTs and ASAs.
longDescription: Asalytic provides detailed analytics for Algorand NFTs and ASAs: holder distributions, floor price tracking, collection rarity, and trading volume across marketplaces. It's the go-to tool for NFT collectors and ASA traders looking at on-chain data.
aiSummary: Analytics for Algorand NFTs and ASAs — holders, floor, rarity, volume.

name: Allo.info
shortDescription: Algorand block explorer with rich ecosystem data.
longDescription: Allo.info is one of the most-used Algorand block explorers, offering transaction lookups, account inspection, ASA and NFT details, and ecosystem analytics. It's the successor to AlgoExplorer and is widely used by developers and traders for on-chain debugging and analysis.
aiSummary: Algorand block explorer with rich ASA/NFT data. Successor to AlgoExplorer.

name: AlgoKit
shortDescription: Official Algorand developer toolkit and CLI.
longDescription: AlgoKit is the official Algorand Foundation developer toolkit. It provides a unified CLI for project scaffolding, smart contract deployment, local network management, and language SDKs in TypeScript and Python. AlgoKit is the recommended starting point for new Algorand developers.
aiSummary: Official Algorand dev toolkit. CLI, SDKs, local network, project templates.

name: PuyaPy
shortDescription: Python smart contract compiler for Algorand.
longDescription: PuyaPy (Puya) is the official Python-to-AVM smart contract compiler for Algorand, developed by the Algorand Foundation. It lets developers write Algorand smart contracts in idiomatic Python that compile to TEAL bytecode. PuyaPy has become the recommended way to build new contracts on Algorand.
aiSummary: Official Python smart contract language for Algorand. Compiles to TEAL.

name: TealScript
shortDescription: Write Algorand smart contracts in TypeScript.
longDescription: TealScript lets Algorand developers write smart contracts in TypeScript that compile to TEAL bytecode. It's a community-driven alternative to PyTeal and PuyaPy, popular among developers with JavaScript/TypeScript backgrounds.
aiSummary: TypeScript smart contract language for Algorand. Compiles to TEAL.

name: Reach
shortDescription: Cross-chain smart contract framework with Algorand support.
longDescription: Reach is a high-level smart contract programming language and framework supporting Algorand and other chains. It provides automatic verification, frontend bindings, and lets developers write contracts at a higher abstraction level than TEAL. Used by Humble DeFi and others in the Algorand ecosystem.
aiSummary: High-level cross-chain smart contract language with full Algorand support.

name: NFDomains
shortDescription: Decentralized identity and naming service for Algorand.
longDescription: NFDomains (NFD) is the decentralized naming service for Algorand. Users can register .algo-style names that resolve to their wallets, attach social profiles, and use NFDs across wallets, dApps, and marketplaces. NFD names are themselves NFTs, freely transferable on the secondary market.
aiSummary: Decentralized naming service for Algorand. NFTs that resolve to wallets, like ENS.

name: Algorand Foundation
shortDescription: The non-profit driving Algorand ecosystem development.
longDescription: The Algorand Foundation is the non-profit organization stewarding the Algorand protocol and ecosystem. It funds grants, runs governance (xGov), develops developer tooling, and supports core protocol research. Treat it as the equivalent of the Ethereum Foundation for the Algorand ecosystem.
aiSummary: Non-profit foundation funding Algorand protocol development and grants.

name: xGov
shortDescription: Community governance program for the Algorand ecosystem.
longDescription: xGov is Algorand's community-driven governance program where ALGO holders propose, vote on, and fund ecosystem grants. xGov sessions run quarterly and distribute millions of ALGO toward ecosystem builders, public goods, and tooling improvements selected by the community.
aiSummary: Community governance program funding Algorand ecosystem grants via ALGO holder votes.

name: Akita Network
shortDescription: Multi-chain ecosystem with deep Algorand integration.
longDescription: Akita Network is a multi-chain community and DeFi project with significant deployment on Algorand. It offers token utilities, NFTs, and integration with Algorand DEXs. Akita is one of the more recognized non-native projects with serious Algorand presence.
aiSummary: Multi-chain DeFi and NFT project with strong Algorand deployment.

name: Messina
shortDescription: Cross-chain bridge for Algorand to major networks.
longDescription: Messina is a cross-chain asset bridge connecting Algorand with Ethereum, Polygon, BNB Chain, and other major networks. It enables ASA-to-ERC20 and ERC20-to-ASA transfers, expanding Algorand's interoperability with the broader crypto ecosystem.
aiSummary: Cross-chain bridge between Algorand and major EVM networks.

name: Wormhole
shortDescription: Generic message-passing bridge supporting Algorand.
longDescription: Wormhole is one of the largest cross-chain interoperability protocols. It supports Algorand alongside Ethereum, Solana, Aptos, Sui, and many others. Wormhole enables token transfers and arbitrary message passing between Algorand and the broader Web3 ecosystem.
aiSummary: Major cross-chain bridge with full Algorand support — token and message passing.

name: USDC on Algorand
shortDescription: Circle's USDC stablecoin, natively issued on Algorand.
longDescription: USDC is the fully-reserved US dollar stablecoin issued by Circle. Algorand was one of the first chains to host native USDC. USDC on Algorand powers DeFi, payments, and real-world asset distribution (e.g., Lofty's daily rental payouts).
aiSummary: Native USDC stablecoin on Algorand. Powers DeFi, payments, and RWA distributions.

name: USDT on Algorand
shortDescription: Tether's USDT stablecoin, available on Algorand.
longDescription: USDT is the largest US dollar-pegged stablecoin by market cap, issued by Tether. It is available natively on Algorand and provides liquidity for trading pairs across the ecosystem's DEXs.
aiSummary: USDT stablecoin natively available on Algorand for trading and payments.

name: VOI Network
shortDescription: Community-built L1 forked from Algorand technology.
longDescription: Voi is a community-led permissionless blockchain built using Algorand's underlying technology stack (AVM, consensus). It's not Algorand itself but is the most direct Algorand-adjacent L1, sharing the same smart contract language and tooling. Many Algorand ecosystem projects also deploy on Voi.
aiSummary: Community-built L1 using Algorand's AVM tech stack. Shares tooling with Algorand.

name: AlgoRealm
shortDescription: On-chain medieval roguelike game on Algorand.
longDescription: AlgoRealm is one of the original on-chain games on Algorand, demonstrating early NFT and smart contract gameplay. Players compete for the Realm crown using ASAs as game items. It remains a reference example for on-chain gaming on the Algorand AVM.
aiSummary: On-chain medieval game on Algorand demonstrating early NFT-based gameplay.

name: Brickwise
shortDescription: Yield and risk scoring for tokenized rental real estate on Algorand.
longDescription: Brickwise is an independent analytics platform that tracks every tokenized rental property on Lofty (Algorand) and RealT (Ethereum/Gnosis). It scores each property on yield, risk, neighborhood quality, and fair value, producing buy/hold/avoid signals. Brickwise covers one of the largest real-world-asset deployments on Algorand.
aiSummary: Independent analytics for tokenized rental real estate on Algorand (Lofty) and Ethereum (RealT).
